# CWE-426: plugins load only from a fixed, server-controlled directory.
lang: go
file: CWE-426-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

const trustedPluginDir = "/opt/codehound/plugins"

func LoadTenantPlugin(c *gin.Context) (plugin.Symbol, error) {
	name := filepath.Base(c.Param("name"))
	if strings.Contains(name, "..") {
		return nil, fmt.Errorf("invalid plugin name")
	}
	modPath := filepath.Join(trustedPluginDir, name+".so")
	p, err := plugin.Open(modPath)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return p.Lookup("Init")
}
